nasb.text: But Jeroboam had set an ambush to come from the rear, so that Israel was in front of Judah and the ambush was behind them.

esv.text: Jeroboam had sent an ambush around to come upon them from behind. Thus his troops were in front of Judah, and the ambush was behind them.

cnv.text: 耶羅波安卻派伏兵繞到猶大人的背後。這樣，猶大人前面有以色列人，他們背後也有伏兵。

ccb.text: 耶罗波安却在犹大人后面设伏兵，企图前后夹攻他们。
